summary: High‑quality UltraMatrix recording that many say sounds better than the official DP40 release.
review: Reviewers rave about the sound, noting that this UltraMatrix FLAC outshines Dave's Picks 40 and is worth downloading. No specific comments on the musical performance were provided, so the show itself remains uncharacterized beyond its favorable recording quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single 4‑star review praising the audio; no information on performance, so rating reflects strong recording but unknown show quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as sounding better than the official Dave's Picks release; FLAC format suggests clear and detailed audio.
